title: The Neural Architect
subtitle: We don't just teach coding; we teach System Design. From block-based logic to AI-assisted Python architecture.

phases.title: Foundations & Ethics
phases.desc: Establish neural literacy, data privacy, and signal logic. Transition from blocks to AI prompts.

phases.title: Passive BCI
phases.desc: Understanding the 'Input' side. Cognitive state detection, focus metrics, and neurofeedback.

phases.title: Reactive BCI
phases.desc: Evoked Potentials (P300/SSVEP). Using automatic brain responses to trigger digital actions.

phases.title: Active BCI & Capstone
phases.desc: Motor Imagery (MI). Using thought-of-movement to control physical robots (VEX/LEGO).

bciJourney.title: BCI Journey
bciJourney.desc: Our interactive learning platform: 3D neuroanatomy, AI tutors (Synapse & Spark), Somas & leaderboards, and the BCI Lab — connect Unicorn Hybrid Black via Bluetooth to run 12 real experiments (P300, Motor Imagery, SSVEP, and more) with 8-channel EEG, all in-browser. Features a "Readiness Gate" to ensure students master theory before accessing hardware.

hardware.title: Hardware: Unicorn Hybrid Black
hardware.desc: Research-grade 8-channel EEG headset. The industry standard for university hackathons, provided by our partner g.tec.

aiCoding.title: AI-Assisted Coding
aiCoding.desc: We teach students to be System Architects. Using Natural Language Prompts to generate Python pipelines for FFT and Classifiers.

aiAssistants.title: AI Assistants 24/7
aiAssistants.desc: The BCI Journey learning platform features AI tutors available around the clock to support your learning process. Get instant help with concepts, coding, and neurotechnology — whenever you need it.

hardwareAction.title: Hardware in Action
hardwareAction.desc: See the hardware component of our curriculum — research-grade EEG headsets, hands-on BCI experiments, and students bridging the gap between brain and machine in real classroom settings.

items.title: Platform Overview
items.desc: Explore 3D neuroanatomy, interactive simulations, and the full learning experience.

items.title: BCI Lab: Real Experiments
items.desc: Connect the Unicorn Hybrid Black headset and run live EEG experiments in-browser.

items.title: AI Mentors: Synapse & Spark
items.desc: Voice conversations with AI tutors available 24/7 for personalized support.

experiments.title: Master List of Experiments
experiments.subtitle: Delivered via BCI Journey's BCI Lab module — connect your Unicorn Hybrid Black headset and run these paradigms in-browser.
